title: Data to Map
description: Upload CSV/JSON region data and visualize it as a choropleth on a China or World map, fully local.

common.resetConfirm: Reset the color scale to defaults?
common.placeholderUpload: Upload a region data file to begin

errors.mapLoadFailed: Failed to load map data, please refresh and try again
errors.downloadTemplate: Failed to download the template, please try again later
errors.downloadFailed: Download failed, please try again later
errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format, please upload a JSON or CSV file
errors.missingColumns: The CSV file must contain name/region and value/count columns
errors.noData: No valid data could be parsed

china.nameHint1: Tip: region names are auto-converted to the map's standard form (e.g. "Beijing" → "Beijing Municipality", "Guangdong" → "Guangdong Province").
china.nameHint2: Supported formats: short province names, full names, and municipalities (e.g. Beijing, Shanghai).
china.configNote: Tip: value ranges should descend from left to right (300 > 200 > 100 > 50 > 30 > 1 > 0).

world.configNote: Tip: buckets are 0, 1-8, 9-30, 30-50 ... values map directly to your data.
world.errorChartNotReady: Chart is not ready yet, please try again shortly
